title: Event Highlights | NYU Shanghai
description: Jointly established by New York University and East China Normal University, NYU Shanghai is the third degree-granting campus in NYU global network, joining NYU Abu Dhabi and NYU New York City.
text:
Event Highlights
Nov 11 2021Ally Week Comes to Life on Campus, Online and AbroadThis year, Ally Week explored themes of sexism, Black joy, non-profit work, trans rights, and more.Community
Oct 29 2021NYU Shanghai Launches the Center for Artificial Intelligence and CultureA research initiative to explore AI’s relations with social systems and how cultural factors shape the future of AITalks
Oct 29 2021Trip.com’s CEO Talks Travel, Gender Equity, and Pandemic Resilience With NYU Shanghai Students Jane Sun joined Vice Chancellor Jeffrey Lehman for a “Conversation with the Vice Chancellor”Conversation with the Vice Chancellor
Oct 22 2021 Six Chinese men survived the Titanic, but what happened to them after? Interview with Arthur Jones on his film “The Six”Community
Oct 15 2021Institute of Contemporary Arts Explores Indigenous Ways of KnowingNew program launches with "Do Rocks Listen?" featuring the work of Australia's Karrabing Film Collective.Institute of Contemporary Arts Exhibition
Oct 15 2021Celebrating Nine Years, Counting Down to 10! Community members mark NYU Shanghai's 9th anniversary with a day of service and learning on Chongming Island.10th Anniversary
Sep 3 2021Paul Salopek Walks Out of Eden and into China - and NYU ShanghaiTrekking across the globe on foot, Salopek documents stories of human migration and climate change.Talks
Jul 6 2021Learning to Play, Playing to Learn: NYU Shanghai Hosts 2021 New Interfaces for Musical ExpressionIn-person talks, exhibitions, and live performances were live-streamed to a global audience.Conference & Symposium
May 25 2021NYU Shanghai Holds First In-Person Commencement of the COVID EraShanghai's COVID-control advisor Dr. Zhang Wenhong addresses nearly 300 graduates.Commencement
Mar 26 2021ponds among ponds: Institute for Contemporary Arts Explores SymbiosisThe ICA launches the final installment of its interdisciplinary investigation of humans' relationship with nature.Institute of Contemporary Arts Exhibition
Mar 5 2021The “Fact” of Opinion: What’s Behind Worsening Global Attitudes Toward China?Social identity, economics, media representation, and COVID-19 have created "shocking" public opinion data.The Provostial Distinguished Lecture series
Feb 26 2021Blackness in Shanghai: Student Org Leads Celebration of Black History MonthEvent series highlights diversity in Black identity and culture, on campus and around the world.Community
Dec 4 2020Young Entrepreneurs Inspire Action in TEDxNYUShanghai Inequality SalonStudent club brings startup founders together to share real stories of turning passion into social impact.Conference & Symposium
Nov 27 2020NYU Shanghai Celebrates Thanksgiving Week The NYU Shanghai community comes together to celebrate the American holiday of Thanksgiving all week.Community
Nov 20 2020NYU Shanghai Launches Center for Applied Social and Economic Research with a Survey on COVID-19CASER is a new research center committed to advancing rigorous social science research on contemporary China.Research
